summary: Comprehensive testing of Discount Codes and Loyalty Points features at checkout completed. All features working correctly: COMEBACK10 discount code validation (10% off, min ₹500), loyalty points balance display (500 points for test@example.com), Use All button for redeeming points, remove discount functionality, and correct order total calculation with both discounts applied.
critical_code_review_comments: Discount code validation correctly checks minimum order requirement (₹500 for COMEBACK10)
Loyalty points balance fetched via useEffect when email is entered
Points redemption correctly calculates value at ₹0.50 per point
Order total calculation correctly applies both discount and loyalty deductions
Remove discount button (X) correctly clears applied discount
Use All button correctly redeems all available points
seed_data_creation: Used existing test@example.com user with 500 loyalty points
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discount codes and loyalty points features fully tested and working. Available discount codes: COMEBACK10 (10% off, min ₹500), WELCOME15 (15% off, min ₹799, max ₹200), BIRTHDAY20 (20% off, min ₹999, max ₹300). Loyalty points: 1 point = ₹0.50, min redemption 100 points.

discount_code_validation.details: COMEBACK10 validates correctly with 10% discount on orders >= ₹500

discount_code_minimum_order.details: Orders below ₹500 correctly rejected with error message

discount_code_display.details: Applied discount shows in Order Summary with code name and amount

remove_discount_button.details: X button removes applied discount and clears input field

loyalty_balance_display.details: 500 points displayed for test@example.com with 'Worth up to ₹250 in savings'

use_all_points_button.details: Use All button redeems all 500 points, showing 'Redeeming 500 points - Saving ₹250'

loyalty_discount_in_summary.details: Loyalty points discount shows in Order Summary as '500 points -₹250'

backend_discount_validate_api.details: POST /api/discount-codes/validate returns correct discount_amount and final_total

backend_loyalty_balance_api.details: GET /api/loyalty/balance returns points, redemption_value (0.5), and tier info

invalid_discount_code.details: Invalid codes return 404 with 'Invalid discount code' message

case_insensitive_codes.details: Discount codes work regardless of case (comeback10 -> COMEBACK10)
